explanation: This command simulates the exploitation of the Follina vulnerability by using pcwrun.exe with relative path traversal to execute a command. The command is modified with quotes and standard syntax to align with safe mutation techniques.
This command uses relative path traversal to invoke cmd.exe via pcwrun.exe, simulating the Sigma rule's detection pattern. It omits unnecessary elements and uses standard syntax for safe testing.
This command demonstrates a safe mutation by inserting quotes and using a benign command (ipconfig) to simulate the Sigma rule's behavior without malicious intent.
